Earthquake_Risk_Explanation: Legacy ZIP fallback ranking signal based only on an approximate ZIP-centroid distance to loaded fault traces (about 5 to 10 km). This does not determine fault-zone membership, shaking, building damage, exposure, or safety at an address.
Flood_Risk_Explanation: Legacy ZIP fallback ranking signal based on the dominant loaded FEMA mapped category intersecting the ZIP (X). This is not an address-point, parcel, exposure, insurance, or safety determination; flooding outside mapped areas may still occur.
Wildfire_Risk_Explanation: Legacy ZIP fallback ranking signal based on the highest loaded CAL FIRE category intersecting the ZIP (High). This does not establish address-level zone membership or rule out wildfire, smoke, ember, evacuation, power-shutoff, or road impacts.

Flood_Risk_Explanation: Legacy ZIP fallback ranking signal based on the dominant loaded FEMA mapped category intersecting the ZIP (X). This is not an address-point, parcel, exposure, insurance, or safety determination; flooding outside mapped areas may still occur.
Wildfire_Risk_Explanation: Legacy ZIP fallback ranking signal based on the highest loaded CAL FIRE category intersecting the ZIP (High). This does not establish address-level zone membership or rule out wildfire, smoke, ember, evacuation, power-shutoff, or road impacts.
